svg.title: Sequence — Login & JWT validation (OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE)

g.text: Sequence — Login & JWT validation (OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE)
[first call after admin provisioned in Keycloak only]
are not auto-mirrored here. The supported
- Token valid but role missing → @PreAuthorize denies → 403
a separate Order(0) filter chain skips JWT entirely
for a fixed list of admin paths. Logs a loud banner
on startup. NEVER set in production.
